title: ConsentTypeValues
description: Consent Classification is the structured grouping of consents based on the purpose for which permission is granted, enabling controlled, compliant, and auditable use of data and actions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Marketing & Commercial Consent
x-enumeration-literals.description: Permission granted to use customer data or contact the customer for promotional and commercial purposes. Examples: Direct marketing via phone, email, SMS; personalized offers; social media targeting; cross-selling and up-selling

x-enumeration-literals.name: Data Processing Consent
x-enumeration-literals.description: Permission to process personal or behavioral data beyond what is strictly required for service delivery. Examples: Personal data processing; profiling and analytics; behavioral analysis; data enrichment

x-enumeration-literals.name: Product & Service Consent
x-enumeration-literals.description: Permission related to the activation, enrollment, or use of specific products or optional services. Examples: Product enrollment; optional service activation; access to digital features

x-enumeration-literals.name: Third-Party Data Sharing Consent
x-enumeration-literals.description: Permission to share customer data with external parties under defined conditions. Examples: Sharing with affiliates; sharing with partners; open banking / API data sharing
